creator: heinrich.adam@iml.unibe.ch
text:
10.3 was no problem to install.
11.0 same procedure as 10.3 but if I choose BSD Labels for partion schema there is the answer : This partition schema (BSD) is not bootable on this platform.
I use a Lenovo T420s. Also on a common Asus PC the same problem.


what is the difference of 10.3 and 11.0 ?
